<x-app-layout> <x-slot name="header"> <h2 class="font-semibold text-xl text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-200 leading-tight"> {{ __('Profile') }} </h2> </x-slot> <div class="py-12"> <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto sm:px-6 lg:px-8 space-y-6"> <div class="p-4 sm:p-8 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 shadow sm:rounded-lg"> <div class="max-w-xl"> <livewire:profile.update-profile-information-form /> </div> </div> <div class="p-4 sm:p-8 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 shadow sm:rounded-lg"> <div class="max-w-xl"> <livewire:profile.update-password-form /> </div> </div> <div class="p-4 sm:p-8 bg-white dark:bg-gray-800 shadow sm:rounded-lg"> <div class="max-w-xl"> <livewire:profile.delete-user-form /> </div> </div> </div> </div> </x-app-layout>
